name: Survival of Obligations
text: Clauses relating to confidentiality, indemnity, dispute resolution, and any other provisions intended to survive termination shall remain effective after termination of this Agreement.

legal_basis.note: Rights accrued before termination are preserved

invalid_if: Critical clauses terminate automatically after contract termination
title: Survival
dispute_hotspots: Which obligations survive — if not listed, parties dispute post-termination obligations
Duration of survival — perpetual confidentiality may be unenforceable
